evaluation.summary: The model experiments found no statistically significant influence of variable or extreme horizontal heat transport coefficients on global temperature or ice edge latitude.
next_directions: Implement higher-resolution discretization and test non-linear transport schemes to uncover subtle gradient effects.
Couple the EBM with more complex ice‑albedo feedbacks and atmospheric dynamics to assess sensitivity beyond the current parameter space.
Perform systematic intercomparisons with Earth system models to identify where simplified EBMs may miss emergent climate feedbacks.
